leadText: The Armor Pass (Japanese: ヨロイパス Armor Pass) is a Key Item introduced in Generation VIII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Armor Pass allows the player to access the Isle of Armor through Wedgehurst Station .

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method Sw Sh IA Appears in the player's Bag upon purchasing the Expansion Pass and updating to at least version 1.2.0

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A pass to go to the Isle of Armor. Show it to the rail staff at Wedgehurst Station.
